form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th over 300m at this track beaten 6 lengths (18.07) behind Tinker Amina in a Mix 3/4 on April 4. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 5th over 300m at this track beaten 6 lengths (18.07) behind Tinker Amina in a Mix 3/4 on April 4. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together entering the home straight and became unbalanced.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when third (17.96) at big odds over 300m at this track. Drawn a inside box but needs to bounce back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when third (17.96) at big odds over 300m at this track. Drawn a inside box but needs to bounce back.

form.formComment: At the last outing finished last in a Grade 5 on March 30 over 400m at Maitland behind Cheryl Blue beaten 19 lengths (23.64). Racing well and has to be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped on n the back straight and became badly unbalanced.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 300m at this track. Prefer to watch at this stage.

formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 300m at this track. Prefer to watch at this stage.

form.formComment: Just been plugging away and needs to improve after being unplaced in six tries. Last start 6th over 300m at this track. Tempted to look elsewhere.

formComments.comment: Just been plugging away and needs to improve after being unplaced in six tries. Last start 6th over 300m at this track. Tempted to look elsewhere.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 2nd on April 6 over 300m at this track behind Remission Run beaten 4 lengths (17.81) in a Grade 5. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Lines up from box 7 for the first time after finishing a 13 length sixth at this track (18.22) in a Grade 5. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.
